title: crypto-vol-scanner output
description: Canonical structured output for the crypto-vol-scanner skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered stream) is described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=real-time tick-level trades + snapshot, B=Crypto Starter (delayed tick freshness)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats. Empty array on Tier A.

run_at.description: UTC timestamp when the scan was run

tickers_resolved.description: Massive crypto tickers actually called (e.g. ['X:BTCUSD', 'X:ETHUSD']). MATIC auto-substituted to POL.

vol_spike_percentile_threshold.description: Realized vol must exceed this percentile of the trailing 30d distribution to flag (default 0.90)

volume_anomaly_threshold.description: Current 24h USD volume / trailing 30d avg must exceed this to flag (default 2.0)

move_zscore_threshold.description: abs(24h_return / 30d_daily_return_std) must exceed this to flag (default 2.0)

basis_bps_threshold.description: Max minus min recent per-exchange price (bps) must exceed this to flag (default 20.0)

events.description: Per-ticker events ranked by composite impact, descending

signal_type.description: Dominant signal that put this event in the top N. 'combined' when 2+ signals fire above threshold; 'quiet' when realized vol is unusually low (sub-25th percentile).

signals_fired.description: All signals that exceeded their threshold. Drives the 'combined' tag.

spot.description: Current spot price from snapshot.lastTrade.p, with the best-price fallback chain when null

spot_source.description: Which field the spot came from: lastTrade.p, day.c, prevDay.c, etc.

move_24h_pct.description: Trailing 24h return as a fraction. Computed as (lastTrade.p / prevDay.c) - 1.

move_zscore.description: 24h return divided by the std of trailing 30d daily log-returns. >2σ = notable, >3σ = tail event. Sign preserved.

realized_vol_24h_pct.description: Annualized realized vol over the last 24h, as a percentage. Computed from hourly close-to-close log returns × sqrt(24 × 365).

vol_percentile_30d.description: Where current 24h realized vol sits in the trailing 30d distribution of rolling-24h realized vol windows. 0.95 = 95th percentile.

vol_vs_avg_ratio.description: Current 24h realized vol divided by trailing 30d average realized vol. >2.0 = sharp regime change.

volume_24h_usd.description: Approximate USD volume for the last completed 24h window. Computed as prevDay.v × prevDay.vw from snapshot.

volume_vs_avg_ratio.description: Current 24h USD volume divided by trailing 30d daily USD-volume average. >2.0 = volume anomaly.

basis_bps.description: Cross-exchange basis: max minus min of the most-recent per-exchange print, in basis points of the midpoint. Null when only one exchange returned recent trades.

exchanges_compared.description: Per-exchange last-price snapshot from /v3/trades. Used to render the cross-exchange context line.

basis_high_exchange.description: Exchange name with the highest recent price

basis_low_exchange.description: Exchange name with the lowest recent price

context_line.description: Optional one-line trader context, rendered as the ↳ continuation. Examples: 'social-driven flow; vol AND volume both 95th+%ile', 'basis widened from 8bps prior 24h; small but persistent', 'unusually quiet; calm-before-storm watch'.

composite_score.description: Ranking score. Composed as max(vol_zscore, volume_zscore, abs(move_zscore), basis_bps_zscore). Higher = more notable.

median_realized_vol_pct.description: Universe-wide median 24h realized vol. Useful for the take ('crypto is in a quiet regime', 'crypto is in a vol regime').

take.description: One- or two-sentence crypto desk read. Plain prose; no bullet list.
